name: title.anvilcraft.patchouli.process.2
pages: $(l:basic/material#magnet_ingot)Magnet blocks$() can lift anvils to drop them down. To obtain magnet blocks for the first time, you need to have $(item)iron blocks$() struck by $(item)lightning$() to transform into hollow magnet blocks. The lightning's range of effect is 3x3 horizontally and 2 blocks high, which can be changed through the configuration file. $(p)Besides waiting for thunderstorms, you can also consume $(item)topaz$() to right-click a lightning rod to create a bolt of lightning. Topaz can be obtained from $(l:basic/material#geode)geodes$().
